user.title: Add a Medication
user.description: Choose a medication name and how you want to track it.

regular_interval.title: Regular Interval Setup
regular_interval.description: Set up dosing at fixed intervals — e.g. every 8 hours.

time_of_day.title: Time of Day Setup
time_of_day.description: Set up dosing at a specific time each day.

as_needed.title: As Needed Setup
as_needed.description: Set up on-demand dosing with a safety limit.

data.time_window_hours: In how many hours? (e.g. Max 2 pills in 8 hours)

cyclic.title: Cyclic/Calendar Pattern Setup
cyclic.description: Set up a cycling schedule — e.g. 5 days on, 2 days off.

effectiveness.title: Metrics Tracker
effectiveness.description: Select which symptoms to track. Each enabled metric adds a 1–10 slider to rate how you feel after each dose.

data.custom_metrics: Add custom tracking metrics — separate multiple with commas, e.g. brain fog, joint stiffness

data_description.custom_metrics: A 1–10 slider will be created for each one added.

data.time_window_hours: In how many hours? (e.g. Max 2 pills in 8 hours)
data.custom_metrics: Add custom tracking metrics — separate multiple with commas, e.g. brain fog, joint stiffness

data_description.metric_pain: Select which symptoms to track. Each enabled metric adds a 1–10 slider to rate how you feel after each dose.
data_description.custom_metrics: A 1–10 slider will be created for each one added.
